entries.name: channel-digest
entries.description: Digest recent Discord channel activity into a short brief (read-only wishes, never posts).

entries.name: email-triage
entries.description: Triage a Gmail inbox: search, read, and DRAFT replies for human review (never wishes for send).

entries.name: research-summarize
entries.description: Ground a written summary in retrieve@1 passages + confined fs-read sources.

entries.name: kx-connector-gmail
entries.description: Bundled Gmail MCP connector (search/read/draft/send; credential by ref, no OAuth dance in-runtime).

entries.name: kx-connector-discord
entries.description: Bundled Discord MCP connector (send_message/read_channel/list_channels; bot token by ref).

entries.name: kx-mcp-echo
entries.description: Bundled reference MCP echo tool (mcp-echo@1, deterministic, no egress) — the live ReAct loop's first Act.
